informational.description: User seeks information or answers to questions
examples: what is the 4 percent rule retirement

commercial.description: User is researching products or services before making a decision
examples: best retirement withdrawal calculator for early retirement

transactional.description: User intends to complete an action or use a tool

navigational.description: User is looking for a specific website or page

classificationNotes: When a keyword matches multiple intent patterns, prioritize the most specific match. Long-tail keywords with 'calculator' typically indicate transactional intent unless preceded by 'how to' or 'best'.
